email_subject: Application for Commercieel bediende at STEGMANN BELGIUM TEMSE
email_body:
Dear Mevr. Julie De Maere,

I am writing to apply for the Commercieel bediende position at STEGMANN BELGIUM TEMSE, as advertised on VDAB. With a background in digital marketing, SEO, and content management, I am confident in my ability to support your sales and marketing teams effectively.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client websites, create and publish SEO-optimized content, and coordinate with external partners. I have experience with MS Office, WordPress, and analytics tools, and I am comfortable learning new systems quickly. I also manage social media integration and have basic knowledge of Canva and Adobe tools.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. I am eager to bring my organizational skills and commercial mindset to STEGMANN.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Mevr. Julie De Maere,

I am excited to apply for the Commercieel bediende position at STEGMANN BELGIUM TEMSE. With a strong foundation in digital marketing, content management, and client communication, I am well-prepared to serve as the link between your customers, sales team, and external partners.

Currently, as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage the full cycle of client projects: from creating and following up on SEO-optimized content to building and maintaining WordPress websites. I coordinate with external agencies for content creation and ensure all communications are professional and aligned with brand guidelines. This experience has honed my ability to handle multiple tasks simultaneously, from order management to marketing campaign support.

I am proficient in MS Office and have experience with analytics tools like Google Analytics and SEMrush. I am also familiar with ERP systems through my work with client data and order tracking. Additionally, I have basic skills in Canva and Adobe, which I have used for social media graphics and promotional materials. I manage LinkedIn pages and understand the importance of maintaining an active and engaging social media presence.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. I am eager to contribute to STEGMANN's growth and take initiative in a dynamic environment. I am available for an interview at your convenience.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
Experience with order management and client communication in a commercial role
Proficient in MS Office and familiar with ERP systems
Skilled in social media management and content creation using Canva and Adobe
Fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving
Strong organizational skills with experience coordinating projects and external partners
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · Content · Commercial Support
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a commercial mindset and experience in client communication, order management, and marketing support. At Episto, I manage client relationships, create and follow up on offers, and coordinate with external partners for content and promotional materials. I have hands-on experience with MS Office, ERP systems, and social media management, including LinkedIn. I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp.

CORE SKILLS
- Commercial & administrative: order management, client communication, offer follow-up, project coordination
- MS Office: Word, Excel, Outlook
- ERP systems: experience with client data and order tracking
- Social media: LinkedIn management, content scheduling, social media integration
- Marketing & content: Canva, Adobe basics, brochure coordination, campaign support
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage client websites and coordinate with external partners for content creation and updates
- Create and follow up on SEO-optimized content, ensuring professional communication
- Track project progress and maintain client relationships
- Use MS Office and analytics tools for reporting and data management

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site with social media integration
- Coordinated with external partners for content and promotional materials
- Managed LinkedIn page and created graphics using Canva

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
